Description:
McDonnell and Associates, P.A. - Bot Maintenance Activities: 
(4 hours/week)

1) Daily bot monitoring
2) Weekly restart of the bots
3) Delete cache & cookies in Chrome
4) Update all apps and ensure the settings are enabled as per the bot’s requirement
5) Delete Outlook spam & sent items (old emails)
6) Delete old documents saved in the shared folder to reduce storage
7) Weekly back up of the code & storing it in a repository for BCP

(4 hours/week)

2) Weekly restart of the bots
3) Delete cache & cookies in Chrome
4) Update all apps and ensure the settings are enabled as per the bot’s requirement
5) Delete Outlook spam & sent items (old emails)
6) Delete old documents saved in the shared folder to reduce storage
7) Weekly back up of the code & storing it in a repository for BCP

McDonnell and Associates, P.A. - Bot Maintenance Activities: 
(4 hours/week)

1) Daily bot monitoring
2) Weekly restart of the bots
3) Delete cache & cookies in Chrome
4) Update all apps and ensure the settings are enabled as per the bot’s requirement
5) Delete Outlook spam & sent items (old emails)
6) Delete old documents saved in the shared folder to reduce storage
7) Weekly back up of the code & storing it in a repository for BCP
